steps.title: Interpret the sample result
steps.content: The survey found that $74\%$ of a random sample of $180$ residents were satisfied. A sample proportion estimates the population proportion, but it does not prove the exact population percentage.

steps.title: Evaluate both statements
steps.content: Statement I does not have to be true because all city residents may not match the sample exactly. Statement II also does not have to be true because another random sample can produce a different percentage.

steps.title: Select the must be true choice
steps.content: Neither statement must be true based on the sample. The answer is A.
